headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Camden Prop Trust, Lowers Price Target to $115
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $119 to $115.
